code: import{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{loginUser}from"../services/authService";import{useAuth}from"../context/AuthContext";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(){const[form,setForm]=useState({email:"",password:""});const[error,setError]=useState("");const{login}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const onSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const data=await loginUser(form);login(data);navigate("/");}catch(err){setError("Login failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"form",onSubmit:onSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Email",value:form.email,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,email:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",value:form.password,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Login"})]});}export default Login;
